_comment: RA-1154 declarative surface map. Every interactive surface (dashboard button, API endpoint, streaming route) MUST have an entry. A CI gate fails PRs touching dashboard/components, dashboard/app/api, or app/server/routes without updating this file. Read by scripts/smoke_test_e2e.py. Keep stdlib-parseable (no comments in the JSON itself — use _comment fields if needed).

horizontal.name: login-wrong-pw
horizontal._comment: RA-1017: lockout activates after 5 failures (returns 429). Single-probe verifies endpoint reachable + auth enforced.

horizontal.name: webhook-morning-intel-nosig
horizontal._comment: RA-1008/RA-1007: morning-intel webhook requires X-Pi-CEO-Secret when WEBHOOK_SECRET set. Surfaces the route for smoke coverage.

horizontal.name: proxy-health
horizontal._comment: RA-1463: session-cookie auth now unlocks the full payload (was minimal shape via cookie path). body_contains gates against regression to {status:ok}. RA-1469 added pi_seo_active so silent-scheduler skipping is visible.

horizontal.name: integrations-health
horizontal._comment: RA-1293 integration health — public, no secrets.

horizontal.name: mission-control
horizontal._comment: RA-1440 Mission Control live feed — backs LiveActivityFeed's 5s poll on /control. Added retroactively with PR #124 lint-unblock.

horizontal.name: phone-gate-unauth
horizontal._comment: Phone companion: destructive-tool approval gate. 401 without TAO_PASSWORD auth proves route exists + auth enforced without creating a real Telegram card (body is ignored on 401).

horizontal.name: phone-progress-unauth
horizontal._comment: Phone companion: live 'Now Working' card update. 401 smoke — see above.

horizontal.name: webhook-github-nosig
horizontal._comment: RA-1504: webhook rejects unsigned requests. Surfaces the route for the RA-1109 .catch cleanup.

horizontal.name: cron-analyze-unauth
horizontal._comment: RA-1504: cron requires Bearer CRON_SECRET. Surfaces the route for the RA-1109 .catch cleanup.

horizontal.name: analyze-missing-repo
horizontal._comment: RA-1504: analyze SSE route requires ?repo=. Surfaces the route for the RA-1109 .catch cleanup.

body.brief: RA-1154 smoke test probe — do nothing, just verify the pipeline responds
